---
title: "心衰竭 — Heart Failure"
---

## 教學講義 Handouts

- [Entresto_Seminar_2026.md](Entresto_Seminar_2026.md)
- [HCM vs Fabry vs ATTR Amyloidosis 鑑別診斷 教學講義.md](HCM vs Fabry vs ATTR Amyloidosis 鑑別診斷 教學講義.md)

## LaTeX Files

- Eur Heart J HNMT Heart Failure 2026.tex
- NEJM Physiologic Pacing Heart Failure 2026.tex
